name: 代数求极限
subject: math
domain_name: Unit 1 极限与连续 Limits & Continuity
curriculum_points:
LEARNING OBJECTIVE
CHA-2.B
Represent the derivative of a function as the limit of a difference quotient.

ESSENTIAL KNOWLEDGE
CHA-2.B.2
The derivative of f is the function whose value at x is lim h→0 (f(x+h)−f(x))/h, provided this limit exists.

LEARNING OBJECTIVE
CHA-2.C
Determine the equation of a line tangent to a curve at a given point.

ESSENTIAL KNOWLEDGE
CHA-2.C.1
The derivative of a function at a point is the slope of the line tangent to a graph of the function at that point.

SUGGESTED SKILL
Implementing Mathematical Processes 1.E
Apply appropriate mathematical rules or procedures, with and without technology.

TOPIC 2.2
Defining the Derivative of a Function and Using Derivative Notation
